_note: Static tool rules + tombstone only. active_tables & step_status ada di SESSION.md. Update file ini hanya kalau: (1) ada breaking change di tool params/schema, atau (2) ada tabel baru yang di-drop.

tool_rules.read_file: OMIT repo arg — default pockiesaints7/core-agi sudah benar
tool_rules.write_file: OMIT repo arg — default pockiesaints7/core-agi sudah benar
tool_rules.log_mistake: required: context, what_failed, fix. optional: domain, root_cause, how_to_avoid, severity
tool_rules.sb_insert: data harus valid JSON string. sessions required: summary(str), actions(array), interface(str)

schema.mistakes: domain, context, what_failed, correct_approach, root_cause, how_to_avoid, severity, tags

_tombstone_note: Tabel ini sudah dihapus permanen. JANGAN query. Kalau ada tabel baru yang di-drop, append ke list ini.
